title: Translate application errors to status codes
scenario: HTTP status codes belong at the adapter edge. Translate typed application errors there instead of putting HTTP concepts in domain code.
instructions: Implement status_code(&CreateOrderUseCaseError) -> u16 at the adapter boundary: 400 for domain errors, 409 for repository conflicts, and 503 for repository unavailability.

hints.body: Add pub fn status_code(error: &CreateOrderUseCaseError) -> u16 below is_retryable.
Match the typed error: any Domain(_) maps to 400, Repository(Conflict) maps to 409, and Repository(Unavailable) maps to 503.
One complete solution for Translate application errors to status codes is shown below.

completionExplanation: status_code now performs the HTTP translation at the adapter edge while domain and use-case errors stay free of HTTP-specific variants.
